Soil/Rock Description: Moderately strong to strong, pinkish grey, fine to coarse grained, moderately to slightly decomposed non-foliated FINE-GRAINED GRANITE with widely spaced, extremely narrow to wide, planar, smooth, iron stained and clean joints, dipping 10°-20°, 60°-70°, 80°-85°.
